file.description: Business document file. Size must be less than 4 megabytes, and file type must be jpeg, png, or pdf.

opt_out.description: If `can_opt_out` is `true` for the document type, an optional flag to opt out of the business document because it is not applicable for your business.

entity_id.description: ID of the entity or person the document is associated with

entity_type.description: Type or role of entity the document is associated with
